extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR infiltrated a 29-rider breakaway wearing yellow jersey, then sat in as rivals attacked GC group while MOHORIČ soloed to stage win
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR entered 29-rider break as yellow jersey, forcing UAE to abandon chase duty; unprecedented tactical flexibility.
CARAPAZ attacked main GC group but Movistar chased him down, revealing team's conflicted priorities with multiple leaders.
ROGLIČ lost 3+ minutes without teammates present, exposing Jumbo-Visma's vulnerability when leader crashes early in Grand Tour.
MOHORIČ attacked Signal de Uchon (hardest debut climb) sub-50km, exploiting moment when GC teams focused on each other.
VAN DER POEL and POGAČAR chased bonus seconds in final 8km despite no stage win chance, prioritizing every GC second.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Joined 29-rider break as race leader, extraordinary tactical aggression revealing team confidence in his superiority
rider_signals.MOHORIČ Matej: positive: Won solo after attacking Signal de Uchon sub-50km, redemption stage win after HAIG crash disaster earlier
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: Lost 3+ minutes completely isolated from teammates, crash injuries compound but team cohesion badly broken
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: Attacked GC group but own Movistar team chased him down, highlighting multi-leader dysfunction
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: Chased bonus seconds in final 8km despite break being caught, showing commitment to GC ambitions
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Attempted race-affecting moves inside 8km from break, prioritizing team GC over own sprint opportunities
rider_signals.KONRAD Patrick: positive: Countered to front group sub-50km showing strong legs, valuable domestique form emerging
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: Made 29-rider break to collect 20 points, extending green jersey lead to 66 through calculated aggression
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: neutral: Made 29-rider break but UAE abandoned chase with Pogačar also there, eliminating stage threat
rider_signals.POELS Wout: neutral: In 29-rider break but UAE stopped chasing when Pogačar infiltrated, nullifying his GC danger
